name: kurtivy--openclaw-voice-assistant
description: Windows voice companion for OpenClaw. Custom wake word via Porcupine, local STT via faster-whisper, streamed responses over the gateway WebSocket, and ElevenLabs TTS with natural chime/thinking sounds. Supports multi-turn conversation with automatic follow-up listening, mic suppression to prevent feedback, and a system tray with pause/resume. Recommended voices: Matilda (XrExE9yKIg1WjnnlVkGX, free tier) or Ivy (MClEFoImJXBTgLwdLI5n, paid tier). Fully customizable wake word, voice, hotkey, and silence thresholds.
